doc_comment: Package facts defines the durable fact models and queue contracts that PCG writes before graph projection. Facts are the contract between collection, parsing, queueing, projection, and reducer-owned materialization. Types in this package describe source truth in a form that survives retries, repair, and replay.
ownership_table_entry: go/internal/facts/ — durable fact models and queue contracts
notes: Leaf contract package; no internal dependencies. Envelope is the interchange unit from collector to projector. StableID produces a deterministic SHA-256 hex ID for payload identity matching. Clone makes a deep copy safe for replay pipelines.
